response.justification: Strong staff-level engineer with recent hands-on MCP and agentic workflow experience and clear technical leadership credentials. However, critical gaps remain: no Python expertise (required skill), only 6 months of explicitly documented GenAI production work versus the 8+ year requirement, and minimal cloud infrastructure depth. Recent transition to AI is promising but insufficient to meet core prerequisites.
strengths: Staff-level technical leader with proven mentoring, workshops, and multiple senior roles across 16+ years
Recent hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic system infrastructure at re:cinq
Strong foundational software engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems with shipping production systems
concerns: No Python experience—required skill; only TypeScript/JavaScript expertise documented
Production AI/ML solutions spanning 8+ years not substantiated; only 6 months explicit GenAI work at re:cinq
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or ML data pipelines

key_factors.factor: Lack of required Python and AI/ML depth
Insufficient production AI experience vs. 8-year requirement
Recent agentic systems and MCP expertise
